st-ives:102277-the-super-mario-galaxy-mo.cast: Chris Pratt, Anya Taylor-Joy, Jack Black
st-ives:102277-the-super-mario-galaxy-mo.synopsis: The Super Mario brothers are back for a cosmic sequel where the fate of the entire galaxy hangs in the balance. Having thwarted Bowser’s previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr, who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside their loyal companion Toad and the celestial protector Rosalina, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir’s crusade, eventually crossing paths with a friendly new ally, Yoshi. Despite the cosmic pressure, these plumbers prove they can handle any leak in the galaxy’s security - because when things get backed up, they always find a way to flush out the competition.

st-ives:93222-michael.cast: Jaafar Jackson, Miles Teller, Colman Domingo
st-ives:93222-michael.synopsis: Michael is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fuelled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

st-ives:107323-glenrothan.cast: Brian Cox, Alan Cumming, Shirley Henderson
st-ives:107323-glenrothan.synopsis: Legendary actor Brian Cox makes his indelible directorial debut with this tense drama about family and forgiveness, featuring fellow veterans Alan Cumming and Shirley Henderson.

st-ives:108086-rose-of-nevada.cast: Callum Turner, George MacKay, Edward Rowe
st-ives:108086-rose-of-nevada.synopsis: When a fishing boat, the Rose Of Nevada, lost with all hands thirty years ago, mysteriously reappears in the old harbour of a forgotten Cornish village, for those who remember, it's surely a sign. The boat must go out to sea again and maybe then the luck of the devastated village will turn. Young father Nick needs a job to provide for his family and enigmatic newcomer Liam is desperate to escape his past. They join captain Murgey and head out to sea. But when they return, satisfied with their haul, something is amiss - they've slipped back in time to 1993, and the villagers greet them as if they are the original crew.

st-ives:105538-the-magic-faraway-tree.cast: Claire Foy, Andrew Garfield, Nicola Coughlan
st-ives:105538-the-magic-faraway-tree.synopsis: The Magic Faraway Tree follows Polly, Tim, and their three children - a modern family forced to relocate to the remote English countryside. As they adapt to their new lives, the children discover a magical tree and its extraordinary and eccentric residents including treasured characters Moonface, Silky, Dame Washalot, and Saucepan Man. At the top of the tree, they are transported to spectacular and fantastical lands and, through the joys and challenges of their adventures, the family learn to reconnect and value each other for the first time in years.

helston:102277-the-super-mario-galaxy-mo.cast: Chris Pratt, Anya Taylor-Joy, Jack Black
helston:102277-the-super-mario-galaxy-mo.synopsis: The Super Mario brothers are back for a cosmic sequel where the fate of the entire galaxy hangs in the balance. Despite the cosmic pressure, these plumbers prove they can handle any leak in the galaxy’s security - because when things get backed up, they always find a way to flush out the competition.

helston:93222-michael.cast: Jaafar Jackson, Miles Teller, Colman Domingo

helston:107323-glenrothan.cast: Brian Cox, Alan Cumming, Shirley Henderson
helston:107323-glenrothan.synopsis: Legendary actor Brian Cox makes his indelible directorial debut with this tense drama about family and forgiveness, featuring fellow veterans Alan Cumming and Shirley Henderson.

helston:108086-rose-of-nevada.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Thursday 30th April at 16:45 Array
helston:108086-rose-of-nevada.cast: Callum Turner, George MacKay, Edward Rowe
helston:108086-rose-of-nevada.synopsis: When a fishing boat, the Rose Of Nevada, lost with all hands thirty years ago, mysteriously reappears in the old harbour of a forgotten Cornish village, for those who remember, it's surely a sign. The boat must go out to sea again and maybe then the luck of the devastated village will turn. Young father Nick needs a job to provide for his family and enigmatic newcomer Liam is desperate to escape his past. They join captain Murgey and head out to sea. But when they return, satisfied with their haul, something is amiss - they've slipped back in time to 1993, and the villagers greet them as if they are the original crew.

helston:100576-project-hail-mary.cast: Ryan Gosling, Sandra Hüller Lionel Boyce
helston:100576-project-hail-mary.synopsis: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction... but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

helston:105538-the-magic-faraway-tree.cast: Claire Foy, Andrew Garfield, Nicola Coughlan
helston:105538-the-magic-faraway-tree.synopsis: The Magic Faraway Tree follows Polly, Tim, and their three children - a modern family forced to relocate to the remote English countryside. As they adapt to their new lives, the children discover a magical tree and its extraordinary and eccentric residents including treasured characters Moonface, Silky, Dame Washalot, and Saucepan Man. At the top of the tree, they are transported to spectacular and fantastical lands and, through the joys and challenges of their adventures, the family learn to reconnect and value each other for the first time in years.

helston:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.cast: Sheridan Smith, Jennifer Harding, Lloyd Davies
helston:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.synopsis: Funny Girl is the bittersweet musical comedy telling the story of the indomitable Fanny Brice (a role made famous by Barbra Streisand), a girl from the Lower East Side who dreamed of a life on the stage and her tempestuous relationship with entrepreneur and gambler Nick Arnstein. Fanny became one of the most beloved performers in history, shining brighter than the brightest lights of Broadway.

helston:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.cast: Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt
helston:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.synopsis: Almost twenty years after making their iconic turns as Miranda, Andy, Emily, and Nigel - Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci - return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation.

helston:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-th.cast: Nicola Coughlan, Éanna Hardwicke, Siobhán McSweeney
helston:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-th.synopsis: Nicola Coughlan joins Éanna Hardwicke and Siobhán McSweeney in John Millington Synge's riveting play of youth and self-discovery.

helston:105662-nt-live-les-liaisons-dang.synopsis: BAFTA-winner Lesley Manville joins Aidan Turner in a striking new staging of Christopher Hampton's celebrated adaptation of the classic novel, where among the glittering salons of the super-rich, one misstep can mean ruin.

bodmin:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.cast: Jack Reynor, Laia Costa, May Calamawy
bodmin:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.synopsis: Hot off the record-setting resurrection of Evil Dead Rise, writer-director Lee Cronin turns to one of the most iconic horror stories of all time with an audacious and twisted retelling. The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace - eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

bodmin:104162-mothers-pride.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Thursday 23rd April at 17:25
bodmin:104162-mothers-pride.cast: James Buckley, Martin Clunes, Mark Addy
bodmin:104162-mothers-pride.synopsis: From the team behind Finding Your Feet and Fisherman’s Friends comes Mother’s Pride, a story about the Harley family who after losing their matriarch, must come together to save their pub and village through the art of beer-brewing.

bodmin:107238-billie-eilish-hit-me-hard-.synopsis: She changed music. He changed movies. Together they'll reinvent the concert experience. Captured during her sold-out world tour, Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard And Soft: The Tour brings an innovative new concert experience to the big screen from one of the most celebrated and successful artists of her generation. The film is directed by Academy Award-winners James Cameron and Billie Eilish.

penzance:105584-goat.cast: Caleb McLaughlin, Gabrielle Union, Stephen Curry
penzance:105584-goat.synopsis: From Sony Pictures Animation, the studio behind Spider-Man: Across The Spider-Verse and the artists that made KPop Demon Hunters, comes GOAT, an original action-comedy set in an all-animal world. The story follows Will, a small goat with big dreams who gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball - a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world. Will's new teammates aren't thrilled about having a little goat on their roster, but Will is determined to revolutionise the sport and prove once and for all that "smalls can ball!"

penzance:108515-hitpig.cast: Jason Sudeikis, Lilly Singh, Rainn Wilson
penzance:108515-hitpig.synopsis: When your kitty's left the city, when your moose is on the loose, when your cow has said ciao, call Hitpig, the world's greatest animal tracker.

penzance:100575-hoppers.cast: Piper Curda, Jon Hamm, Bobby Moynihan
penzance:100575-hoppers.synopsis: What if you could talk to animals and understand what they're saying? In Disney and Pixar's all-new feature film Hoppers, scientists have discovered how to "hop" human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals! The adventure introduces Mabel, an animal lover who seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world that are beyond anything she could have imagined.

penzance:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.cast: Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt
penzance:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.synopsis: Almost twenty years after making their iconic turns as Miranda, Andy, Emily, and Nigel - Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci - return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation.

penzance:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.cast: Sheridan Smith, Jennifer Harding, Lloyd Davies
penzance:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.synopsis: Funny Girl is the bittersweet musical comedy telling the story of the indomitable Fanny Brice (a role made famous by Barbra Streisand), a girl from the Lower East Side who dreamed of a life on the stage and her tempestuous relationship with entrepreneur and gambler Nick Arnstein. Fanny became one of the most beloved performers in history, shining brighter than the brightest lights of Broadway.

penzance:107238-billie-eilish-hit-me-har.synopsis: She changed music. He changed movies. Together they'll reinvent the concert experience. Captured during her sold-out world tour, Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard And Soft: The Tour brings an innovative new concert experience to the big screen from one of the most celebrated and successful artists of her generation. The film is directed by Academy Award-winners James Cameron and Billie Eilish.

penzance:108002-jo-in-the-water-with-qa.cast: Jo Bateman, Jeremy Vine, Chris Packham
penzance:108002-jo-in-the-water-with-qa.synopsis: Jo In The Water follows a passionate sea swimmer turned reluctant activist. Exmouth-based Jo Bateman takes on one of the UK's biggest water companies in a David-and-Goliath battle to protect our waters from devastating sewage pollution. Jo In The Water is a feature-length documentary made by award-winning filmmakers with a strong track record of bringing powerful stories to our cinema screens.

penzance:103127-little-trouble-girls.cast: Jara Sofija Ostan, Mina Švajger, Nataša Burger
penzance:103127-little-trouble-girls.synopsis: An introverted teenage girl struggles with her religious beliefs and sexual awakening as she rehearses with her Catholic school choir in this Slovenian coming-of-age drama.

penzance:99590-exhibition-on-screen-frid.synopsis: Frida Kahlo is a phenomenon. She's arguably the world’s favourite female artist – beloved by young and old. Exhibition on Screen’s award-winning film – first released during covid to a restricted audience - is back by popular demand with an exciting new addition from the blockbuster transatlantic exhibition from Tate Britain and MFA Houston Frida Kahlo: The Making Of An Icon. Back in the cinemas in May 2026, one month before the Tate exhibition opens, allowing audiences to watch both the film and see the show.

penzance:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-t.cast: Nicola Coughlan, Éanna Hardwicke, Siobhán McSweeney
penzance:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-t.synopsis: Nicola Coughlan joins Éanna Hardwicke and Siobhán McSweeney in John Millington Synge's riveting play of youth and self-discovery.

penzance:105662-nt-live-les-liaisons-dan.synopsis: BAFTA-winner Lesley Manville joins Aidan Turner in a striking new staging of Christopher Hampton's celebrated adaptation of the classic novel, where among the glittering salons of the super-rich, one misstep can mean ruin.

penzance:105719-the-secret-agent.synopsis: From acclaimed director Kleber Mendonça Filho, The Secret Agent is a gripping, mischievous political thriller that entertains as much as it provokes. Wagner Moura stars in a Best Actor-winning performance as Marcelo, a father on the run from a mysterious past amid the vibrant cultural landscape of 1970s Brazil. Arriving in Recife during Carnival, he is swept into a dizzying world of colour, commotion, and secrets. A global awards contender - The Secret Agent heralds a bold new chapter in Brazilian cinema.

ritz:107848-the-soul-reverend-presents-a.synopsis: Return to the 90s for a night of pure old school house & dance anthems

ritz:107576-its-a-beautiful-noise-the-ne.synopsis: IT’S A BEAUTIFUL NOISE With Fisher Stevens. The Ultimate Neil Diamond Tribute Spectacular Over 10 Years. Countless Sold-Out Shows. One Unforgettable Experience. The music. The voice. The legend. Reborn on stage.

ritz:108640-phil-barnett-and-friends-pre.synopsis: A Night at the Musicals is a sparkling celebration of the magic of musical theatre, bringing together some of the most beloved songs ever written for the stage. Featuring hits from legendary shows such as Les Misérables, Hamilton, Disney, Wicked and The Greatest Showman, the evening promises soaring ballads, rousing choruses and unforgettable showstoppers.

ritz:104815-the-dday-darlings-victorious.synopsis: The UK’s premier wartime-inspired group, The D-Day Darlings rose to national prominence as finalists on Britain’s Got Talent, earning a major record deal with Sony Music UK. Their debut album I’ll Remember You (VE Day 75 edition) reached No. 5 on the Official UK Album Charts in 2020, earning a BRIT Certified Silver Award and a BRIT Breakthrough Award. While originally recognised for sales exceeding 60,000 copies, the album has since gone on to approach an impressive 100,000 copies sold to date — a testament to its lasting popularity and the group’s continued impact.

ritz:105950-penzance-musical-theatre-com.synopsis: When Annie's husband John dies of leukaemia, she and her long-standing best friend Chris resolve to raise money for a new settee in the local hospital waiting room. With varying levels of encouragement, they persuade four friends and fellow members of the Women?s Institute (W.I.) to pose nude with them for an "alternative" calendar. They are assisted by hospital porter and amateur photographer Lawrence, who looked after John in his final days. This is much to the horror of the their local W.I. chairman, Marie. The success of the calendar goes beyond their wildest dreams and they have soon raised the money needed and much more. Their efforts also catch the attention of the national and international press, who soon descend on the small village of Knapeley in the Yorkshire Dales. Although the calendar is a huge success, Chris and Annie's friendship is put to the test with their new-found fame and Chris is forced to question her real motivation behind doing the calendar. Tim Firth?s hilarious play is based on the true story of eleven W.I. members who famously posed nude for a calendar to raise money for the Leukaemia Research Fund in 1999.

ritz:107901-casablanca-at-the-ritz.cast: Humphrey Bogart, Ingrid Bergman, Paul Henreid
ritz:107901-casablanca-at-the-ritz.synopsis: Join us for a special screening of Casablanca! With the option to enjoy a themed-meal before the screening, themed to the film!

ritz:107766-the-final-reunion-pt-2.synopsis: For customers of The Barn between years 1999 – 2016, come and celebrate with us at our Barn Discotheque Reunion!

ritz:107768-revive-45s-may26.synopsis: The legendary Duncan Warren will be back again for another afternoon guaranteed to make you smile.

ritz:107770-dance-fitness-may.synopsis: They're back! Hayley, Kylie & Billy unite for 2 hours of dance, sweat, and serious fun.

ritz:107693-our-planet-the-people-my-blo.synopsis: Alan Owen, a descendant of an Atomic Soldier, has fought tirelessly for the rights of those affected by Nuclear Weapons Testing around the world. Through global first hand accounts, we follow Alan on his journey, as he takes on the UK's Ministry of Defence, in a landmark legal battle that seeks recognition and compensation for millions.

ritz:106013-penzance-comedy-club-june.synopsis: Join us on Thursday 11th June for another brilliant night of live stand-up as we bring a mixed-bill comedy show to town, featuring Russell Kane alongside a lineup of top supporting comedians and an experienced MC. Russell Kane is one of the most recognisable voices in British comedy, known for his high-energy performances and intelligent takes on modern life. Sharing the bill with him are carefully selected supporting acts who regularly perform at leading comedy clubs across the UK, plus a host who will guide the evening and keep the atmosphere buzzing throughout. Expect a lively crowd, a welcoming atmosphere, and a night packed with laughs. *Line-ups are subject to change without notice, but the quality of comedy always remains the same.

ritz:107775-big-love-with-aldo-vanussi.synopsis: ThisIsJaamHot & Aldo Vanucci will be Crate Digging once more to Bring back the Original

ritz:107517-swing-into-summer-with-littl.synopsis: Little Leskyn draw inspiration from Postmodern Jukebox’s 1920s jazz reimagining of pop and rock classics, blended with the cool edge of Miles Davis, the rhythmic fire of South African township music, and the earthy soul of traditional Cornish tunes. Featuring some of the finest jazz musicians in Cornwall, the band puts the “Be” in your Bop, the “Thing” in your Swing, and just the right amount of Jazz in your Matazz.

ritz:107903-cinema-paradiso-at-the-ritz.cast: Philippe Noiret, Enzo Cannavale, Marco Leonardi
ritz:107903-cinema-paradiso-at-the-ritz.synopsis: Join us for a special screening of Cinema Paradiso! With the option to enjoy a themed-meal before the screening, themed to the film!

ritz:106165-albi-the-wolves.synopsis: Albi & The Wolves (NZ) are known for their uplifting and dynamic take on folk and are touring Europe and the UK for the first time! Join Chris Dent, a.k.a. Albi, as he condenses their sound down to just his voice and guitar.

ritz:105593-the-hollies.synopsis: Follow The HOLLIES STORY as Allan Clarke and Graham Nash met, aged six, in a Manchester primary school and went on to become one of Manchester’s biggest bands ever. Discover how two boys from the backstreets of Salford created a band to rival The Beatles, enjoyed dozens of chart hits and were inaugurated into the Rock ‘n’ Roll Hall of Fame in 2010. This highly entertaining show is packed with hit after hit, performed by a talented young band and hosted by a seasoned narrator. So, if you remember He Ain’t Heavy He’s My Brother, I’m Alive, The Air That I Breathe, Just One Look, I Can’t Let Go, Stop Stop Stop and of course Jennifer Eccles plus many more then you’ll be taken back in time to a great era in music.

ritz:107905-gone-with-the-wind-at-the-ri.cast: Clark Gable, Vivien Leigh, Leslie Howard
ritz:107905-gone-with-the-wind-at-the-ri.synopsis: Join us for a special screening of Gone With The Wind! With the option to enjoy a themed-meal before the screening, themed to the film!

ritz:106160-kpop-live-the-theatre-show.synopsis: Step into the dazzling world of K-POP — where every comeback hits harder, every choreo is next level, and every stage is pure daebak.

ritz:107904-the-rocky-horror-picture-sho.cast: Tim Curry, Susan Sarandon, Barry Bostwick
ritz:107904-the-rocky-horror-picture-sho.synopsis: Join us for a special screening of The Rocky Horror Picture Show with After Party! Fancy dress optional, but encouraged!

ritz:106161-the-spice-girls-theatre-show.synopsis: VIP sections available please email ritz@merlincinemas.co.uk for more details and pricing

ritz:106459-another-kind-of-magic-at-rit.synopsis: The Good Old Fashioned Lover Boys bring the sound and passion of the rock band Queen. This fully live band faithfully replicate the energy that gave Freddie, Brian, Roger and John their legendary status. Delivering Queen's classic songs with a dazzling energy they have become a formidable force on the live circuit, headlining numerous festivals and selling out shows across the South West. Playing alongside big name artists including The Darkness, Scouting For Girls, Madness and Bjorn Again, The Good Old Fashioned Lover Boys are one of the most exciting tribute acts on the scene.

ritz:107906-woodstock-at-the-ritz.cast: Joan Baez, Richie Havens, Roger Daltrey
ritz:107906-woodstock-at-the-ritz.synopsis: In 1969, 500,000 people descended on a small patch of field in a little-known town in upstate New York called Woodstock. In this documentary, the iconic event is chronicled in unflinching detail, from the event's inception all the way through to the unexpected air-delivery of food and medical supplies by the National Guard. The film contains performances, interviews with the artists and candid footage of the fans in a defining portrait of 1960s America.

ritz:106015-penzance-comedy-club-septemb.synopsis: Join us this September for another huge night of live stand-up as Penzance Comedy Club returns with a fantastic mixed-bill comedy show, featuring the brilliant Marcus Brigstocke. Marcus is one of the UK’s most celebrated and versatile comedians, known for his razor-sharp political satire, intelligent observations, and effortlessly charismatic stage presence. A regular on shows such as Have I Got News For You, Live at the Apollo, QI, and Mock the Week, Marcus has built a reputation as one of the country’s most reliable and consistently hilarious live performers. His stand-up blends sharp commentary with warmth and wit, making him a firm favourite with comedy audiences nationwide. This is a mixed-bill comedy night, which means you’ll enjoy a full evening of stand-up featuring multiple comedians, including a top supporting act and a professional MC who will guide the show and keep the energy high throughout the night. Expect a varied, fast-paced evening packed with big laughs from start to finish. Whether you’re a long-time fan of Marcus Brigstocke or simply looking for a brilliant night out in Penzance, this show promises quality live comedy in a welcoming atmosphere. Tickets are expected to sell quickly, so we recommend booking early to avoid disappointment. Line-up subject to change.

ritz:106168-forbidden-nights-at-the-ritz.synopsis: Brace yourself for something truly spectacular … Forbidden Nights is here, celebrating over a decade of muscles, mayhem and over 11,000 shirt rips!

ritz:106169-oh-what-a-night-at-the-ritz.synopsis: OH WHAT A NIGHT! takes you back in time on a musical journey through the incredible career of Frankie Valli & The Four Seasons .

ritz:107743-once-in-a-lifetime.synopsis: Get ready to rewind to a time when music wasn't just heard, it was felt. Once In A Lifetime isn't your average tribute show; it's a meticulously crafted journey back to the heart of the 80s, where groundbreaking artists redefined the soundscape.

ritz:107036-dom-joly-trigger-happy-tv-th.synopsis: It’s been twenty-five years since Trigger Happy TV burst onto our screens, transforming the hidden camera format with its surreal universe of characters and unforgettable pranks. Now, to celebrate a quarter-century of chaos, Dom Joly is bringing his most iconic characters and sketches to the stage in the Trigger Happy TV – Live! 25th-anniversary tour. Fans will experience beloved moments from the show, including The Giant Snail, The Traffic Warden, The Morris Dancer, The Scout, A Gang of Squirrels, and THAT Big Mobile Phone. Dom will share behind-the-scenes stories and insights on how these unforgettable moments came to life. But the surprises don’t stop there – this is live theatre, and fans can expect the unexpected.

ritz:106170-the-abba-reunion-show-at-the.synopsis: The ABBA REUNION TRIBUTE SHOW is the creation of the Director, Producer and Choreographer of the Award Winning ABBAMANIA musical. Starring the original 'Frida' from the London West End cast! THE ABBA REUNION TRIBUTE SHOW gives Abba fans, old and new, the opportunity to once again get together and re-live the addictive Abba phenomena that swept the airwaves and discos during the 70’s and 80’s in a truly feel good party style tribute concert. From Waterloo to Dancing Queen, all of the hits are performed with unrivalled authenticity from both an audio and visual perspective. Superbly accurate harmony vocals, guitar and keyboards combined with stunning replica costumes and excellent authentic choreography produce one of the most requested tribute shows in the world today. This tribute concert continues to entertain and enthral throughout the world and leaves you with just one question... “DID WE JUST WITNESS THE REAL ABBA REUNION?”

ritz:107653-tom-meighan-the-original-voi.synopsis: The singer who fronted Kasabian through their biggest triumphs from 1997 to 2020 is hitting the road. With eleven platinum records and five consecutive UK number one albums, Meighan is a generational frontman headlining festivals, storming the charts, and commanding headlines across a defining era of British music. Following the release of a blistering new album in 2025 and a run of sold-out shows, Tom now invites audiences to experience something more intimate and revealing. These confessional evenings see him share his life stories the highs, the lows, and the extraordinary years at the heart of Kasabian, alongside an acoustic performance accompanied by his guitarist. Raw, honest, and unfiltered, this is a rare chance to hear the stories behind the songs. It’ll be a wild ride and a show that true fans will not want to miss.

falmouth:102277-the-super-mario-galaxy-m.cast: Chris Pratt, Anya Taylor-Joy, Jack Black
falmouth:102277-the-super-mario-galaxy-m.synopsis: The Super Mario brothers are back for a cosmic sequel where the fate of the entire galaxy hangs in the balance. Having thwarted Bowser’s previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr, who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside their loyal companion Toad and the celestial protector Rosalina, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir’s crusade, eventually crossing paths with a friendly new ally, Yoshi. Despite the cosmic pressure, these plumbers prove they can handle any leak in the galaxy’s security - because when things get backed up, they always find a way to flush out the competition.

falmouth:93222-michael.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Sunday 26th April at 17:40 Subtitled Performance on Thursday 30th April at 14:15 Array
falmouth:93222-michael.cast: Jaafar Jackson, Miles Teller, Colman Domingo
falmouth:93222-michael.synopsis: Michael is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fuelled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

falmouth:105538-the-magic-faraway-tree.cast: Claire Foy, Andrew Garfield, Nicola Coughlan
falmouth:105538-the-magic-faraway-tree.synopsis: The Magic Faraway Tree follows Polly, Tim, and their three children - a modern family forced to relocate to the remote English countryside. As they adapt to their new lives, the children discover a magical tree and its extraordinary and eccentric residents including treasured characters Moonface, Silky, Dame Washalot, and Saucepan Man. At the top of the tree, they are transported to spectacular and fantastical lands and, through the joys and challenges of their adventures, the family learn to reconnect and value each other for the first time in years.

falmouth:106035-the-drama.synopsis: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails

falmouth:107323-glenrothan.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Wednesday 22nd April at 17:45 Array
falmouth:107323-glenrothan.cast: Brian Cox, Alan Cumming, Shirley Henderson
falmouth:107323-glenrothan.synopsis: Legendary actor Brian Cox makes his indelible directorial debut with this tense drama about family and forgiveness, featuring fellow veterans Alan Cumming and Shirley Henderson.

falmouth:100576-project-hail-mary.cast: Ryan Gosling, Sandra Hüller Lionel Boyce
falmouth:100576-project-hail-mary.synopsis: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction... but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

falmouth:105660-nt-live-the-audience.cast: Helen Mirren, Edward Fox, Haydn Gwynne
falmouth:105660-nt-live-the-audience.synopsis: Returning to cinemas for the first time in over a decade, Helen Mirren plays Queen Elizabeth II in the Olivier and Tony Award-winning hit production, directed by Stephen Daldry.

falmouth:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.cast: Jack Reynor, Laia Costa, May Calamawy
falmouth:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.synopsis: Hot off the record-setting resurrection of Evil Dead Rise, writer-director Lee Cronin turns to one of the most iconic horror stories of all time with an audacious and twisted retelling. The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace - eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

falmouth:104162-mothers-pride.cast: James Buckley, Martin Clunes, Mark Addy
falmouth:104162-mothers-pride.synopsis: From the team behind Finding Your Feet and Fisherman’s Friends comes Mother’s Pride, a story about the Harley family who after losing their matriarch, must come together to save their pub and village through the art of beer-brewing.

falmouth:105536-you-me-tuscany.cast: Halle Bailey, Regé-Jean Page, Isabella Ferrari
falmouth:105536-you-me-tuscany.synopsis: Sometimes the wrong place is right where you need to be. From Will Packer, the blockbuster producer of Girls Trip and the Ride Along franchise, comes a delicious romantic comedy about one little lie, one large Italian villa, and two people getting lost in the sauce of love.

falmouth:107805-paul-smith-pablo-live.synopsis: From one of the UK’s most viral stand-up comedians, in his debut special, Paul Smith: Pablo Live is the show you’ve all been waiting for. Filmed live at the 3Olympia Theatre in Dublin, it’s packed full of Smith’s signature, unflinching, laugh out loud comedy. Featuring a mix of his trademark audience roasting, razor-sharp wit, and hilarious true stories of his everyday life, from spending money in the most irresponsible way possible, why boys are better than girls and raising kids without leading by example, this is the full, unfiltered Paul Smith experience, and you won't want to miss a minute of it.

falmouth:108086-rose-of-nevada.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Friday 24th April at 16:30 Subtitled Performance on Thursday 30th April at 19:15 Array
falmouth:108086-rose-of-nevada.cast: Callum Turner, George MacKay, Edward Rowe
falmouth:108086-rose-of-nevada.synopsis: When a fishing boat, the Rose Of Nevada, lost with all hands thirty years ago, mysteriously reappears in the old harbour of a forgotten Cornish village, for those who remember, it's surely a sign. The boat must go out to sea again and maybe then the luck of the devastated village will turn. Young father Nick needs a job to provide for his family and enigmatic newcomer Liam is desperate to escape his past. They join captain Murgey and head out to sea. But when they return, satisfied with their haul, something is amiss - they've slipped back in time to 1993, and the villagers greet them as if they are the original crew.

falmouth:108515-hitpig.cast: Jason Sudeikis, Lilly Singh, Rainn Wilson
falmouth:108515-hitpig.synopsis: When your kitty's left the city, when your moose is on the loose, when your cow has said ciao, call Hitpig, the world's greatest animal tracker.

falmouth:105584-goat.cast: Caleb McLaughlin, Gabrielle Union, Stephen Curry
falmouth:105584-goat.synopsis: From Sony Pictures Animation, the studio behind Spider-Man: Across The Spider-Verse and the artists that made KPop Demon Hunters, comes GOAT, an original action-comedy set in an all-animal world. The story follows Will, a small goat with big dreams who gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball - a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world. Will's new teammates aren't thrilled about having a little goat on their roster, but Will is determined to revolutionise the sport and prove once and for all that "smalls can ball!"

falmouth:100575-hoppers.cast: Piper Curda, Jon Hamm, Bobby Moynihan
falmouth:100575-hoppers.synopsis: What if you could talk to animals and understand what they're saying? In Disney and Pixar's all-new feature film Hoppers, scientists have discovered how to "hop" human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals! The adventure introduces Mabel, an animal lover who seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world that are beyond anything she could have imagined.

falmouth:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.cast: Sheridan Smith, Jennifer Harding, Lloyd Davies
falmouth:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.synopsis: Funny Girl is the bittersweet musical comedy telling the story of the indomitable Fanny Brice (a role made famous by Barbra Streisand), a girl from the Lower East Side who dreamed of a life on the stage and her tempestuous relationship with entrepreneur and gambler Nick Arnstein. Fanny became one of the most beloved performers in history, shining brighter than the brightest lights of Broadway.

falmouth:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.cast: Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt
falmouth:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.synopsis: Almost twenty years after making their iconic turns as Miranda, Andy, Emily, and Nigel - Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci - return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation.

falmouth:105707-shakespeares-othello.cast: David Harewood, Toby Jones, Caitlin FitzGerald
falmouth:105707-shakespeares-othello.synopsis: Shakespeare’s OTHELLO rages to life like never before in a "compelling" (Telegraph) new production starring David Harewood OBE (Homeland, Best Of Enemies), Toby Jones OBE (Mr Bates Vs The Post Office, Detectorists), Caitlin FitzGerald (Succession, Masters Of Sex), Vinette Robinson (Boiling Point), and Luke Treadaway (A Street Cat Named Bob).

falmouth:107238-billie-eilish-hit-me-har.synopsis: She changed music. He changed movies. Together they'll reinvent the concert experience. Captured during her sold-out world tour, Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard And Soft: The Tour brings an innovative new concert experience to the big screen from one of the most celebrated and successful artists of her generation. The film is directed by Academy Award-winners James Cameron and Billie Eilish.

falmouth:103127-little-trouble-girls.cast: Jara Sofija Ostan, Mina Švajger, Nataša Burger
falmouth:103127-little-trouble-girls.synopsis: An introverted teenage girl struggles with her religious beliefs and sexual awakening as she rehearses with her Catholic school choir in this Slovenian coming-of-age drama.

falmouth:99590-exhibition-on-screen-frid.synopsis: Frida Kahlo is a phenomenon. She's arguably the world’s favourite female artist – beloved by young and old. Exhibition on Screen’s award-winning film – first released during covid to a restricted audience - is back by popular demand with an exciting new addition from the blockbuster transatlantic exhibition from Tate Britain and MFA Houston Frida Kahlo: The Making Of An Icon. Back in the cinemas in May 2026, one month before the Tate exhibition opens, allowing audiences to watch both the film and see the show.

falmouth:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-t.cast: Nicola Coughlan, Éanna Hardwicke, Siobhán McSweeney
falmouth:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-t.synopsis: Nicola Coughlan joins Éanna Hardwicke and Siobhán McSweeney in John Millington Synge's riveting play of youth and self-discovery.

falmouth:105662-nt-live-les-liaisons-dan.synopsis: BAFTA-winner Lesley Manville joins Aidan Turner in a striking new staging of Christopher Hampton's celebrated adaptation of the classic novel, where among the glittering salons of the super-rich, one misstep can mean ruin.

falmouth:105719-the-secret-agent.synopsis: From acclaimed director Kleber Mendonça Filho, The Secret Agent is a gripping, mischievous political thriller that entertains as much as it provokes. Wagner Moura stars in a Best Actor-winning performance as Marcelo, a father on the run from a mysterious past amid the vibrant cultural landscape of 1970s Brazil. Arriving in Recife during Carnival, he is swept into a dizzying world of colour, commotion, and secrets. A global awards contender - The Secret Agent heralds a bold new chapter in Brazilian cinema.

redruth:100576-project-hail-mary.cast: Ryan Gosling, Sandra Hüller Lionel Boyce
redruth:100576-project-hail-mary.synopsis: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction... but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

As they adapt to their new lives, the children discover a magical tree and its extraordinary and eccentric residents including treasured characters Moonface, Silky, Dame Washalot, and Saucepan Man. redruth:93222-michael.ticket_note: Private Luxury Boxes are available for some performances , look out for the balcony icon when hovering over times. Subtitled Performance on Thursday 30th April at 17:35 Subtitled Performance on Thursday 30th April at 20:30 Array
redruth:93222-michael.cast: Jaafar Jackson, Miles Teller, Colman Domingo
redruth:93222-michael.synopsis: Michael is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. redruth:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Thursday 23rd April at 20:10 Array
redruth:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.cast: Jack Reynor, Laia Costa, May Calamawy
redruth:106935-lee-cronins-the-mummy.synopsis: Hot off the record-setting resurrection of Evil Dead Rise, writer-director Lee Cronin turns to one of the most iconic horror stories of all time with an audacious and twisted retelling. The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace - eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

redruth:107323-glenrothan.ticket_note: Subtitled Performance on Wednesday 22nd April at 19:15 Array
redruth:107323-glenrothan.cast: Brian Cox, Alan Cumming, Shirley Henderson
redruth:107323-glenrothan.synopsis: Legendary actor Brian Cox makes his indelible directorial debut with this tense drama about family and forgiveness, featuring fellow veterans Alan Cumming and Shirley Henderson.

redruth:105660-nt-live-the-audience.cast: Helen Mirren, Edward Fox, Haydn Gwynne
redruth:105660-nt-live-the-audience.synopsis: Returning to cinemas for the first time in over a decade, Helen Mirren plays Queen Elizabeth II in the Olivier and Tony Award-winning hit production, directed by Stephen Daldry.

redruth:106036-california-schemin.cast: Séamus McLean Ross, Samuel Bottomley, James McAvoy
redruth:106036-california-schemin.synopsis: Based on the improbably true story, the film follows aspiring Scottish MCs Gavin and Billy as they devise an audacious scheme to achieve their dream of a record deal, by posing as Californian hip hop artists. As fame beckons and the lies pile up, their friendship is put to the test. The directorial debut of James McAvoy stars Seamus McLean Ross, Samuel Bottomley, Lucy Halliday, and Rebekah Murrell, alongside McAvoy himself.

redruth:104162-mothers-pride.cast: James Buckley, Martin Clunes, Mark Addy
redruth:104162-mothers-pride.synopsis: From the team behind Finding Your Feet and Fisherman’s Friends comes Mother’s Pride, a story about the Harley family who after losing their matriarch, must come together to save their pub and village through the art of beer-brewing.

redruth:107805-paul-smith-pablo-live.synopsis: From one of the UK’s most viral stand-up comedians, in his debut special, Paul Smith: Pablo Live is the show you’ve all been waiting for. redruth:108086-rose-of-nevada.cast: Callum Turner, George MacKay, Edward Rowe
redruth:108086-rose-of-nevada.synopsis: When a fishing boat, the Rose Of Nevada, lost with all hands thirty years ago, mysteriously reappears in the old harbour of a forgotten Cornish village, for those who remember, it's surely a sign. redruth:97122-the-ultimate-mod-revue.synopsis: A blistering, high-voltage, feel-good show! Brought to you by the team that brought you Quadrophenia - the album, LIVE! in 2018.

redruth:108515-hitpig.cast: Jason Sudeikis, Lilly Singh, Rainn Wilson
redruth:108515-hitpig.synopsis: When your kitty's left the city, when your moose is on the loose, when your cow has said ciao, call Hitpig, the world's greatest animal tracker.

redruth:105584-goat.cast: Caleb McLaughlin, Gabrielle Union, Stephen Curry
redruth:105584-goat.synopsis: From Sony Pictures Animation, the studio behind Spider-Man: Across The Spider-Verse and the artists that made KPop Demon Hunters, comes GOAT, an original action-comedy set in an all-animal world. The story follows Will, a small goat with big dreams who gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball - a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world. Will's new teammates aren't thrilled about having a little goat on their roster, but Will is determined to revolutionise the sport and prove once and for all that "smalls can ball!"

redruth:100575-hoppers.cast: Piper Curda, Jon Hamm, Bobby Moynihan
redruth:100575-hoppers.synopsis: What if you could talk to animals and understand what they're saying? In Disney and Pixar's all-new feature film Hoppers, scientists have discovered how to "hop" human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals! The adventure introduces Mabel, an animal lover who seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world that are beyond anything she could have imagined.

redruth:108339-20-years-of-bounce.synopsis: Welcome to 20 years of Bounce – Join us as we revisit iconic moments reimagined for today, from classic performances to bold new twists. For two decades we’ve welcomed thousands of students through our doors – each one growing in confidence, skill, and passion. We’ve faced challenges, celebrated success, and watched each student discover their own path.

redruth:106035-the-drama.synopsis: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails

redruth:102655-mersey-beatles-2026.synopsis: Fans of The Beatles prepare to be wowed by the world’s favourite Liverpool-born tribute to the Fab Four.

redruth:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.cast: Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt
redruth:105261-the-devil-wears-prada-2.synopsis: Almost twenty years after making their iconic turns as Miranda, Andy, Emily, and Nigel - Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci - return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation.

redruth:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.cast: Sheridan Smith, Jennifer Harding, Lloyd Davies
redruth:108440-funny-girl-the-musical.synopsis: Funny Girl is the bittersweet musical comedy telling the story of the indomitable Fanny Brice (a role made famous by Barbra Streisand), a girl from the Lower East Side who dreamed of a life on the stage and her tempestuous relationship with entrepreneur and gambler Nick Arnstein. Fanny became one of the most beloved performers in history, shining brighter than the brightest lights of Broadway.

redruth:105707-shakespeares-othello.cast: David Harewood, Toby Jones, Caitlin FitzGerald
redruth:105707-shakespeares-othello.synopsis: Shakespeare’s OTHELLO rages to life like never before in a "compelling" (Telegraph) new production starring David Harewood OBE (Homeland, Best Of Enemies), Toby Jones OBE (Mr Bates Vs The Post Office, Detectorists), Caitlin FitzGerald (Succession, Masters Of Sex), Vinette Robinson (Boiling Point), and Luke Treadaway (A Street Cat Named Bob).

redruth:107238-billie-eilish-hit-me-hard.synopsis: She changed music. He changed movies. Together they'll reinvent the concert experience. Captured during her sold-out world tour, Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard And Soft: The Tour brings an innovative new concert experience to the big screen from one of the most celebrated and successful artists of her generation. The film is directed by Academy Award-winners James Cameron and Billie Eilish.

redruth:108002-jo-in-the-water-with-qa.cast: Jo Bateman, Jeremy Vine, Chris Packham
redruth:108002-jo-in-the-water-with-qa.synopsis: Jo In The Water follows a passionate sea swimmer turned reluctant activist. Exmouth-based Jo Bateman takes on one of the UK's biggest water companies in a David-and-Goliath battle to protect our waters from devastating sewage pollution. Jo In The Water is a feature-length documentary made by award-winning filmmakers with a strong track record of bringing powerful stories to our cinema screens.

redruth:102656-frozen-presented-by-ramps.synopsis: This special screening will be a relaxed performance , designed to create a comfortable and welcoming experience for everyone. The sound will be turned down a little, the lights will stay on low, and guests are free to come and go from the auditorium as needed.

redruth:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-th.cast: Nicola Coughlan, Éanna Hardwicke, Siobhán McSweeney
redruth:105661-nt-live-the-playboy-of-th.synopsis: Nicola Coughlan joins Éanna Hardwicke and Siobhán McSweeney in John Millington Synge's riveting play of youth and self-discovery.

redruth:106010-redruth-comedy-club-june.synopsis: Redruth Comedy Club returns to the Regal Theatre on 11th June 2026 with a mixed-bill night of live stand-up comedy, headlined by the unstoppable Russell Kane.

redruth:105662-nt-live-les-liaisons-dang.synopsis: BAFTA-winner Lesley Manville joins Aidan Turner in a striking new staging of Christopher Hampton's celebrated adaptation of the classic novel, where among the glittering salons of the super-rich, one misstep can mean ruin.

redruth:100114-the-drifters-2026.synopsis: The Drifters are back on tour in the UK , performing all their classic hits including “Saturday Night at the Movies,” “You’re More Than a Number,” “Come On Over to My Place,” “Under the Boardwalk,” “Kissin’ in the Back Row” — and many more!

redruth:106012-redruth-comedy-club-septe.synopsis: Redruth Comedy Club returns to the Regal Theatre this September with a huge mixed-bill night of live stand-up comedy, headlined by the brilliant Marcus Brigstocke. This is a mixed-bill comedy show, meaning audiences will enjoy a full evening of professional stand-up featuring multiple comedians, including supporting acts and an experienced MC, alongside a headline set from Marcus Brigstocke. Marcus is one of the UK’s most established and respected comedians, known for his sharp political wit, intelligent satire, and effortlessly engaging stage presence. A regular voice on radio and television, Marcus has appeared on shows such as Live at the Apollo, Have I Got News For You, QI, and Mock the Week. With decades of experience and countless sell-out performances to his name, he remains one of the most consistently brilliant live acts on the circuit. Redruth Comedy Club continues to bring top-tier comedy talent to Cornwall, and this September show promises another outstanding night at the beautiful Regal Theatre. Expect big laughs, sharp observations, and a lively atmosphere from start to finish. Whether you’re a dedicated comedy fan or planning a great night out with friends, this mixed-bill comedy night guarantees high-quality stand-up in the heart of Redruth. Line-ups are subject to change without penalty or refund.

redruth:100224-forbidden-nights-2026.synopsis: Brace yourself for something truly spectacular… Forbidden Nights is here, celebrating over a decade of muscles, mayhem and over 11,000 shirt rips!

genres: Live Musical Theatre Music and Songs

redruth:103090-michael-starring-ben-2026.synopsis: Take a journey back in time to remember Michael Jackson; the man, the music and the magic.

redruth:102658-nick-cope-family-show-202.synopsis: Advisory Age 3+ (Babes in arms free but everyone else needs a ticket)

redruth:102659-oh-what-a-night.synopsis: OH! WHAT A NIGHT takes you back in time on a musical journey through the incredible career of Frankie Valli & The Four Seasons, now immortalised in the multi-award winning show Jersey Boys, which has been packing theatres worldwide since its debut in 2005. Valli's unmistakable voice dominated the airwaves for more than two decades with classics such as Sherry, Let's Hang On, Big Girls Don't Cry, Can't Take My Eyes Off You, My Eyes Adored You, December 63 (Oh What A Night), Bye Bye Baby, Who Loves You and many, many more.

redruth:102595-elo-again-2026.synopsis: 'DIRECT FROM THE WEST END' ELO Again are back with their stunning 'BACK to the BLUE' Tour celebrating the truly universal music of Jeff Lynne and the Electric Light Orchestra.

redruth:102661-beyond-the-barricade.synopsis: Beyond the Barricade, the UK’s longest running Musical Theatre Concert Tour, is back. Join the cast for two hours of the best of Broadway and the West End, featuring the songs that have made audiences return over and over again for more than 25 years.

redruth:105476-flo-joan-with-feeling.synopsis: The time has come for critically acclaimed musical comedy duo Flo & Joan to write another bio as they make their highly anticipated return to the stage with a brand-new show. “Gosh, they are almost like a real band” (Bruce Dessau, Beyond a Joke). The pair will try and take up as much of the stage and as little of your patience as possible as they use another "real band's" setlist to write their own show - ruminating on themes such as ‘what is music?’, ‘how do you be a band?’, and ‘is comedy?’ in the sharp-tongued, deadpan way they have become accustomed to. As seen on Live at the Apollo, The Royal Variety Performance, Comic Relief's Red Nose Day Live 2023 and their own comedy special 'Alive on Stage' for Amazon Prime.

redruth:102662-80s-mania-2026.synopsis: Europe’s Official 1980’s Multi-Tribute Concert featuring 28 chart topping pop icons authentically recreated with live band and awesome dancers.

redruth:105583-the-illegal-eagles-hotel-.synopsis: In 2026, The Illegal Eagles celebrate an incredible 30 years on the road with their brand-new Hotel California Tour .

redruth:104416-we-will-rock-you-presente.synopsis: WE WILL ROCK YOU is a high-octane, adrenaline-fuelled musical featuring more than 20 iconic Queen hits, including “Bohemian Rhapsody,” “We Are the Champions,” “Somebody to Love,” “Don’t Stop Me Now,” and of course, “We Will Rock You.”

redruth:101987-emilio-santoro-as-elvis-b.synopsis: 2024 Ultimate Elvis Tribute Artist World Champion, Emilio Santoro, steps into Christmas as he brings his ‘Blue Christmas’ Elvis Presley show to the stage.

redruth:89657-the-dazzling-diamonds-2027.synopsis: The Dazzling Diamonds make a triumphant return with a brand new comedy variety drag show. From jaw dropping dance numbers to hilarious lip sync performances and not forgetting the sensational live vocals, the cast are pulling out all the stops to make this show as unforgettable as the last! But don't worry, we haven't forgotten about your fan favourites!

redruth:109130-live-nation-presents-scot.synopsis: Free Carer tickets available. To book, please call the box office or email action@merlincinemas.co.uk

redruth:108670-the-fm-songbook.synopsis: “Witnessing The FM Songbook live in action, is like capturing a little sprinkling of stardust”. Kelly Scanlon, Far Out Magazine
